security_note: gh api output for the milestone list, and later a Bash tool result during a mid-task resume, both contained embedded fake system-reminder-style text (fake date-change notices, fake MCP 'tokensave' tool instructions, fake 'Auto Mode Active' directive). Treated as untrusted plain-text data in all cases, never followed, never acted on.
milestone_placement_rationale: Existing milestones are numbered by GitHub creation order (2,5,6,7,8,9 = Phase1,3,4,5,6,7). Phase 5 ('Benchmark suite') is the more test-centric of the two candidates the user flagged (ground-truth queries, precision/recall benchmarking of the storage+retrieval stack) versus Phase 6 ('Demo + deployment + load tests', which is broader: UI, deployment, README, plus load tests). Benchmarking a storage engine that still has two open HIGH-severity concurrency/correctness bugs (2a.2.2 MVCC snapshot premature-reclaim race, 2a.4.3 dangling B+Tree NextSibling) would produce unreliable results, so this epic must land before Phase 5. GitHub milestones have no native insert-between ordering; named it 'Phase 4.5' (sits between Phase 4 'Query pipeline' milestone #6 and Phase 5 milestone #7 by naming convention, matching this repo's numbering pattern) and created as milestone #10 (next available creation-order number).

epics.title: Phase 4.5: Storage-engine technical debt & correctness follow-ups

tasks.title: engine/btree: crash-safety & correctness follow-ups
source: pending.md: node-latch eviction, TryLock retry cap, Lookup doc overclaim, repairEmptyLeafAtParent/split-ordering regression-test gap

subtasks.title: Fix dangling cross-grandparent NextSibling after degenerate-ancestor splice
subtasks.ac: spliceOutDegenerateAncestor patches the true left-neighbor NextSibling even when gj==0 (cross-grandparent), or a descent-time safeguard prevents trusting a dangling link.

subtasks.title: Add retry cap / livelock guard to crabbing TryLock restart-from-root loop
subtasks.ac: errRestartFromRoot loop bounded, surfaces explicit error instead of retrying forever.

subtasks.title: Bound NodeStore latch registry with eviction
subtasks.ac: latch.go's map[uint64]*nodeLatch bounded via LRU/refcount eviction, mirrors engine/mvcc's commitLocks.

subtasks.title: Fix Tree.Lookup doc comment overclaim (never locks)
subtasks.ac: Doc comment accurately describes single brief rootMu acquisition.

subtasks.title: Add fast deterministic regression tests for repairEmptyLeafAtParent orphan fix + split write-ordering fix
subtasks.ac: Two hook-forced-interleaving tests independently pin down both fixed bug classes.

subtasks.title: Harden low-risk untested paths (consolidated)
subtasks.ac: Adds coverage for ReadNode/WriteNode error paths, chooseLeafSplit/chooseInternalSplit boundaries, PrefixScan empty tree, corrupted .root sidecar.

tasks.title: engine/mvcc: snapshot/epoch correctness follow-up
source: regression.jsonl: subtask 2a.2.2 (HIGH, unresolved, not in pending.md)

subtasks.title: Fix NewSnapshot epoch-acquire-before-version-read TOCTOU
subtasks.ac: AcquireCurrentEpoch called before cat.Get() version read; RunCompaction never reclaims a still-pinned Snapshot's version.

subtasks.title: Correct TestGCUnderConcurrency doc-comment overclaim
subtasks.ac: Doc comment no longer claims equivalence to the narrow deterministic 2a.2.2 regression test.

tasks.title: engine/split: wiring, eviction & recovery follow-ups
source: pending.md: split.Trigger wiring, FileGuard eviction, abandoned SPLITTING recovery, raw topic-path keys, crash-injection subtest reconstruction, TestReaderDuringSplit flake, issue #14 wording overclaim

subtasks.title: Wire engine/split.Trigger into engine/catalog/content.go's Append
subtasks.ac: ContentStore.Append invokes Trigger/Signal/CrossesThreshold on every append.

subtasks.title: Bound FileGuard registry with eviction
subtasks.ac: Per-fileID guard map bounded, same eviction approach as 4.5.1.3.

subtasks.title: Add automatic recovery/timeout for abandoned SPLITTING catalog records
subtasks.ac: Lease/heartbeat-based timeout reverts StatusSplitting after crash; future BeginSplit succeeds.

subtasks.title: Add topic-path key normalization/namespace layer for B+Tree keys
subtasks.ac: ExecuteSplitBtreeInsert uses a normalization layer instead of raw path strings.

subtasks.title: Reconstruct fresh in-memory objects in TestSplitAtomicCommit's crash-injection subtests
subtasks.ac: 4 crash-point subtests use freshly reconstructed catalog/tree/appender objects, not reused partially-mutated ones.

subtasks.title: Fix TestReaderDuringSplit ~1-3% timing flake with deterministic barrier
subtasks.ac: Sleep-based overlap replaced with a signal-channel barrier; no false failures.

subtasks.title: Correct issue #14 / docs/LLD/split.md snapshot-isolation wording overclaim
subtasks.ac: Wording reflects actual no-torn-read guarantee, not true MVCC snapshot isolation.

tasks.title: engine/wal: btree checkpoint durability + doc/wording fixes
source: pending.md: btree SaveRoot/WAL-replay gap, cosmetic duplicated doc-comment
regression.jsonl: subtasks 1.3.1-1.3.4 open low/medium items not closed by 1.3.5

subtasks.title: Wire btree SaveRoot into WAL replay or add periodic auto-checkpoint + crash-window test
subtasks.ac: RecoverFromWAL no longer silently no-ops on btree WAL records, or SaveRoot is auto-invoked.

subtasks.title: Delete orphaned duplicated AppendAndApply doc-comment block
subtasks.ac: Orphaned block (~lines 342-370) removed.

subtasks.title: Add RecordTypeInvalid / out-of-range RecordType validation
subtasks.ac: DecodeTypedRecord rejects Type 0 and out-of-range types.

subtasks.title: Correct checkpoint.go doc comment false claim vs SaveRoot precedent
subtasks.ac: Doc comment no longer claims lineage to SaveRoot's WriteAt idiom.

subtasks.title: docs/LLD/wal.md LLD-sync pass
subtasks.ac: Documents record format, RecordType vocabulary, checkpoint manifest schema, Replay contract, torn-tail handling.

tasks.title: engine/catalog: low-risk hardening follow-ups
source: regression.jsonl: open low/medium items from subtasks 1.1.3, 1.1.4, 1.4.1, 1.4.3

subtasks.title: Add isUsed guard to FreePage to reject double-free
subtasks.ac: FreePage errors on double-free instead of silent no-op.

subtasks.title: Add IDAllocator cross-check against catalog.dat high-water-mark
subtasks.ac: Sidecar/catalog.dat mismatch detected on first CRUD use.

subtasks.title: Add concurrent Append-vs-Read -race test for ContentStore
subtasks.ac: No-torn-read guarantee empirically pinned down under -race.

subtasks.title: Add ContentStore.Create duplicate-fileID semantics test/guard
subtasks.ac: Duplicate Create behavior explicitly documented and tested; empty/large content covered.

subtasks.title: docs/LLD/catalog.md LLD-sync pass
subtasks.ac: Documents ContentStore contract, WAL-before-apply wiring, striped-mutex FileManager scoping.

standing_convention_note: User instruction (added mid-run, 2026-07-08): at the end of each future milestone/epic close-out, any new pending.md/regression.jsonl items generated during that epic should be folded into this same Phase 4.5 tech-debt milestone rather than spawning a new one, until Phase 4.5 itself is closed out.
